acceptance.assertion: The API JWT runtime secret on wg-prod-1 has been rotated after the operator-output exposure and the API container was recreated without printing the value.
The runtime source contains SMTP host, port, from, auth policy and the SMTP credential pair, verified only by presence metadata.
AUTH_PUBLIC_LOGIN is enabled only after SMTP readiness passes and AUTH_LOG_MAGIC_TOKEN remains disabled.
acceptance.verifier: readiness receipt and rendered compose presence check

acceptance.assertion: A Magic-Link request for an allowed address is accepted and the email is received externally without token leakage in logs.
acceptance.verifier: mailbox confirmation plus redacted log check

goal: Before closing weltgewebe issue #1370, rotate the exposed API JWT runtime secret on wg-prod-1, inject the Brevo SMTP credential pair through an approved secret channel, enable public login only after the readiness preflight passes, and verify real Magic-Link delivery.

metadata.block_reason: SMTP credential pair is not available in an approved secret source, and an exposed API JWT runtime secret must be rotated before public-login rollout proceeds.

schema_repair.secret_boundary: execution.policy normalized to review-before-effect and secret-channel represented as isolation=namespace; privileged secret boundary preserved in metadata.block_reason and required_capabilities

title: Rotate runtime JWT and finish SMTP-backed public login rollout
